title: Silicon seed crystal puller rod
description: A puller rod for growing silicon boules by Czochralski process. It is made from single-crystal silicon. The shiny tip is the part to be dipped into molten silicon and acts as a seed crystal. Note the notch for holding by a chuck. The rod weighs 36 grams and is about 14 cm long and 1.2 cm in diameter.
author: Warut Roonguthai
attribution_md:
Silicon seed crystal puller rod
A puller rod for growing silicon boules by Czochralski process. It is made from single-crystal silicon. The shiny tip is the part to be dipped into molten silicon and acts as a seed crystal. Note the notch for holding by a chuck. The rod weighs 36 grams and is about 14 cm long and 1.2 cm in diameter.

Image: Warut Roonguthai ([source](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Silicon_seed_crystal_puller_rod.jpg))
